modules.name: poetflow.plugins.dependency
documentation:
Copyright (C) 2024 felipepimentel plc

This module defines classes and methods to modify the behavior of Poetry's add and remove commands
for monorepo support.

classes.name: poetflow.plugins.dependency.DummyInstaller

methods.name: poetflow.plugins.dependency.DummyInstaller.from_installer
documentation:
Creates a DummyInstaller instance from an existing Installer instance.

Args:
    installer: The original installer instance.

Returns:
    A new DummyInstaller instance with the same attributes.

methods.name: poetflow.plugins.dependency.DummyInstaller.run
documentation:
Overrides the run method to always return 0.

The add/remove commands will modify the pyproject.toml file only if this command returns 0.

Returns:
    Always returns 0.

A dummy installer that overrides the run method and disables it

Note: For more details, refer to the docstring of `MonorepoAdderRemover`.

classes.name: poetflow.plugins.dependency.MonorepoError
documentation: Base exception for Monorepo related errors

classes.name: poetflow.plugins.dependency.LockfileUpdateError
documentation: Raised when there's an error updating the lockfile

classes.name: poetflow.plugins.dependency.MonorepoAdderRemover

methods.name: poetflow.plugins.dependency.MonorepoAdderRemover.execute
documentation:
Replaces the installer with a dummy installer.

This method creates a copy of the poetry object to prevent modification of the original
and sets a dummy installer to disable the installation part of the add/remove commands.
It allows modifying the pyproject.toml file without generating a per-project lockfile.

Args:
    event: The event that triggered the command.

methods.name: poetflow.plugins.dependency.MonorepoAdderRemover.post_execute
documentation:
Handles post-execution steps for add/remove commands.

Updates the root lockfile and rolls back changes if needed.

Args:
    event: The event that triggered the command termination.

A class to modify the behavior of Poetry's add and remove commands for monorepo support.

This class ensures that the add and remove commands are executed in a way that supports
monorepo setups, including handling the shared lock file and rolling back changes if needed.

modules.name: poetflow.plugins.venv
documentation:
Copyright (C) 2024 felipepimentel plc

This module contains the VenvModifier class, which modifies the virtual environment (venv) for a
Poetry command. It ensures that the shared virtual environment of the monorepo root is activated
for commands that require an environment such as `poetry shell` and `poetry run`.

classes.name: poetflow.plugins.venv.VenvModifier

methods.name: poetflow.plugins.venv.VenvModifier.execute
documentation:
Execute the plugin.

Args:
    event: The command event

A class to modify the virtual environment (venv) of poetry commands.

This class ensures that the appropriate virtual environment is activated for commands that
require an environment. It prevents the activation of the per-project environments and forces
the activation of the monorepo root venv. If another venv is already activated, it does not
activate any other venv to maintain consistency with Poetry's behavior.

methods.name: poetflow.plugins.lock.LockModifier.execute
documentation:
Execute the plugin.

Args:
    event: Command event

modules.name: poetflow.utils.executor
documentation:
Copyright (C) 2024 Felipe Pimentel <fpimentel88@gmail.com>

This module provides parallel execution capabilities for running commands across multiple packages.

classes.name: poetflow.utils.executor.ParallelExecutor

methods.name: poetflow.utils.executor.ParallelExecutor.run_command
documentation:
Runs a command across multiple packages

Args:
    command: Command to run as list of strings
    packages: List of package names to run command for. If None, runs for all packages.
    cwd: Working directory for command execution. If None, uses package directory.

Returns:
    List of CommandResult objects
Executes commands across multiple packages in parallel
